About

Welcome to my personal blog. I write about ideas in technology, reading, and life.

This site is built with Astro, supports bilingual content (English & Chinese), and is deployed automatically to GitHub Pages.

Writing principles

  • Write until you can fully explain an idea to yourself
  • Prefer explaining "why" over "how"
  • Code samples should be runnable, not fragments

Get in touch

  • GitHub: @otto666357
  • Email: hello@example.com
